final_prompt.prompt:
Create a marketing poster for a gaming monitor launch, designed for vertical short-video cover use.

Style/medium: minimalist high-end graphic design, Swiss-style typography, clean sans-serif aesthetic
Composition: rule of thirds, large bold headline occupying upper two-thirds, product visual in lower third, centered alignment
Subject: gaming monitor product hero shot with sleek bezel-less design, subtle RGB accent glow
Scene/backdrop: pure dark gradient background from charcoal to black, no distracting elements
Lighting/mood: soft studio lighting on product, subtle rim light, premium and sophisticated atmosphere
Color palette: deep black background, electric blue or cyan accent, high-contrast white text
Text (verbatim): "8k GGU 电竞显示器 1000hz" as main headline, "全球首发全新面板 低延迟 完美色彩" as supporting tagline
Constraints: vertical 9:16 aspect ratio optimized for mobile screens; headline must dominate visual hierarchy; maximum readability at thumbnail size
Avoid: cluttered layouts, multiple font families, gradient text effects, stock photo aesthetics, decorative flourishes, generic gaming clichés like fire or lightning
